title: How to unsubscribe from Audible (US)
description: Audible is a subscription service that provides access to audiobooks and other spoken-word content. You can cancel your Audible membership on the Audible website. Note that you cannot cancel your subscription from the Audible app; you must use a web browser. If you subscribed through the Apple App Store or Google Play Store, you need to cancel directly through those services.

web.title: Cancel Audible Subscription via Website
web.description:
Here's how to cancel your Audible subscription through their website:

*   Go to the Audible website and sign in with your Amazon account.
*   Hover over your name at the top of the page.
*   Select "Account Details" from the menu.
*   Find and select the "Cancel membership" link.
*   Confirm by selecting "Continue to cancel" until you see the confirmation page.

app.title: Cancel Audible Subscription via Apple App Store
app.description:
Here's how to cancel your Audible subscription if purchased through the Apple App Store:

*   Open the Settings app on your iPhone or iPad.
*   Tap your name, then tap Subscriptions.
*   Select your Audible subscription and tap Cancel Subscription.

seo_text: Cancel Audible subscription, unsubscribe from Audible, Audible membership cancellation, stop Audible subscription, end Audible membership
